modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty inviting prospective students to events using VisitDays.

full_description_text: 
The department is trying to plan an event and needs to invite prospective students to attend. However, there seems to be a problem with using VisitDays for sending out these invitations. It is unclear how to properly set up the invites for both on-campus and virtual events. This has caused some confusion and delays in the planning process.
